glosses.ja: 掘っ立て小屋; 小屋

sentences.target: On rénove notre baraque cet été.

translations.fr: On rénove notre baraque cet été.
translations.en: We're renovating our house this summer.
translations.es: Estamos renovando nuestra casa este verano.
translations.de: Wir renovieren unser Haus diesen Sommer.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今年夏天要装修我们的房子。
translations.yue: 我哋今年夏天會裝修我哋間屋。
translations.ru: Этим летом мы ремонтируем наш дом.
translations.pt: Vamos reformar nossa casa neste verão.
translations.he: אנחנו משפצים את הבית שלנו בקיץ הזה.
translations.vi: Mùa hè này chúng tôi sẽ sửa nhà.
translations.nl: We verbouwen ons huis deze zomer.
translations.uk: Цього літа ми ремонтуємо наш будинок.
translations.hi: इस गर्मी में हम अपने घर का नवीनीकरण कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ανακαινίζουμε το σπίτι μας αυτό το καλοκαίρι.
translations.nb: Vi pusser opp huset vårt i sommer.
translations.id: Musim panas ini kami merenovasi rumah kami.
translations.sv: I sommar renoverar vi vårt hus.
translations.da: Vi renoverer vores hus til sommer.
translations.ja: 今年の夏に家をリフォームします。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; impersonal ‘on’ used colloquially for ‘we’, triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Finite main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with ‘on’; transitive verb.
Possessive determiner (1st person plural), modifies ‘baraque’, agrees in gender/number with the noun.
Common noun (feminine singular), informal register; direct object of ‘rénove’.
Demonstrative determiner (masculine singular form before vowel), modifies ‘été’ to mark a specific time.
Common noun denoting a season; temporal complement (‘cet été’) specifying when the action occurs.

sentences.target: Sa baraque est au bout de la rue.
sentences.reading: /sa baʁak ɛ o bu də la ʁy/

translations.fr: Sa baraque est au bout de la rue.
translations.ipa: /sa baʁak ɛ o bu də la ʁy/
translations.en: His/Her house is at the end of the street.
translations.es: Su casa está al final de la calle.
translations.de: Ihr Haus steht am Ende der Straße.
translations.it: La sua casa è in fondo alla strada.
translations.ko: 그 사람의 집은 길 끝에 있어요.
translations.ru: Его дом находится в конце улицы.
translations.pt: A casa dele fica no fim da rua.
translations.vi: Nhà của người ấy ở cuối con phố.
translations.nl: Zijn huis staat aan het einde van de straat.
translations.hu: A háza az utca végén van.
translations.hi: उसका घर सड़क के अंत में है.
translations.pl: Jego dom jest na końcu ulicy.
translations.el: Το σπίτι του είναι στο τέλος του δρόμου.
translations.nb: Huset hans ligger i enden av gata.
translations.sv: Hans hus ligger i slutet av gatan.
translations.ro: Casa lui este la capătul străzii.
translations.cs: Jeho dům je na konci ulice.
translations.da: Hans hus ligger for enden af vejen.
translations.ja: 彼の家は通りの突き当たりにあります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person singular, feminine singular form), modifies ‘baraque’.
Common noun (feminine singular); subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject ‘baraque’ to a locative predicate.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the definite article ‘le’; introduces the locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; head of the prepositional complement (‘au bout’).
Preposition introducing the genitive complement (‘de la rue’).
Definite article (feminine singular) modifying ‘rue’.
Common noun; complement of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: Je rêve d'acheter une petite baraque.

translations.fr: Je rêve d'acheter une petite baraque.
translations.en: I dream of buying a small house.
translations.de: Ich träume davon, ein kleines Haus zu kaufen.
translations.pt: Eu sonho em comprar uma casinha.
translations.tr: Küçük bir ev satın almayı hayal ediyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi mơ ước mua một căn nhà nhỏ.
translations.nl: Ik droom ervan een klein huis te kopen.
translations.hu: Arról álmodom, hogy veszek egy kis házat.
translations.hi: मैं एक छोटा घर खरीदने का सपना देखता हूँ.
translations.el: Ονειρεύομαι να αγοράσω ένα μικρό σπίτι.
translations.nb: Jeg drømmer om å kjøpe et lite hus.
translations.id: Saya bermimpi membeli sebuah rumah kecil.
translations.sv: Jag drömmer om att köpa ett litet hus.
translations.da: Jeg drømmer om at købe et lille hus.
translations.ja: 小さな家を買うのが夢です。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person singular).
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); takes ‘de’ before an infinitival complement.
Preposition ‘de’ with elision before vowel; introduces the infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘rêver de’.
Indefinite article (feminine singular) modifying ‘baraque’.
Attributive adjective (feminine singular) modifying ‘baraque’.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of ‘acheter’.

sentences.target: Votre baraque sent la peinture fraîche.

translations.fr: Votre baraque sent la peinture fraîche.
translations.en: Your place smells like fresh paint.
translations.es: Su casa huele a pintura fresca.
translations.de: Euer Zuhause riecht nach frischer Farbe.
translations.it: La vostra casa odora di vernice fresca.
translations.zh-Hans: 你家里有股新刷油漆的味道。
translations.ru: У вас дома пахнет свежей краской.
translations.pt: Sua casa cheira a tinta fresca.
translations.vi: Nhà của bạn có mùi sơn mới.
translations.ar: منزلك تفوح منه רائحة الطلاء החדש.
translations.nl: Jullie huis ruikt naar verse verf.
translations.uk: У вас вдома пахне свіжою фарбою.
translations.hi: आपके घर में ताज़ा पेंट की गंध आ रही है.
translations.pl: W waszym domu pachnie świeżą farbą.
translations.el: Το σπίτι σας μυρίζει φρέσκο χρώμα.
translations.ro: Casa voastră miroase a vopsea proaspătă.
translations.cs: Ve vašem domě je cítit čerstvá barva.
translations.da: Jeres hus lugter af frisk maling.
translations.ja: あなたの家は新しいペンキの匂いがします。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person plural/formal), modifies ‘baraque’.
Common noun (feminine singular); subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); takes a direct object to express perceived odor.
Definite article (feminine singular) modifying ‘peinture’.
Common noun; head of the direct object phrase.
Attributive adjective (feminine singular) modifying ‘peinture’.
